info.name: e-BGX Platform API
info.description:
# e-BGX — Bank Guarantee Marketplace

Complete API reference for the e-BGX platform built on Firebase Firestore.

**Base URL:** `https://firestore.googleapis.com/v1/projects/e-bgxcom/databases/(default)/documents`

## Authentication
All requests require a Firebase ID Token in the `Authorization` header:
```
Authorization: Bearer {{id_token}}
```

## User Roles
- **Applicant** — Companies applying for Bank Guarantees
- **Bank** — Partner banks quoting and issuing BGs
- **Admin** — e-BGX platform administrators

## BG Status Lifecycle
`PROCESSING → OFFER_ACCEPTED → FD_REQUESTED → FD_PAID → BG_DRAFTING → ISSUED`

item.name: 🔑 Auth — Get ID Token
item.description: Exchange Firebase credentials for an ID token to use in all subsequent requests.

request.description:
Signs in a user and returns an `idToken`. Copy the `idToken` value and set it as the `id_token` collection variable.

**Response field to copy:** `idToken`

item.name: 📋 BG Applications
item.description: Create and manage Bank Guarantee applications. Collection: `bg_applications`

body.raw:
{
  "fields": {
    "bg_id": { "stringValue": "BG-1001" },
    "applicant_id": { "stringValue": "{{applicant_id}}" },
    "applicant_name": { "stringValue": "Acme Corp Pvt Ltd" },
    "applicant_pan": { "stringValue": "AAACA1234A" },
    "applicant_gstin": { "stringValue": "27AAACA1234A1Z5" },
    "bg_type": { "stringValue": "Performance BG" },
    "amount_inr": { "integerValue": "5000000" },
    "beneficiary_name": { "stringValue": "NHAI" },
    "beneficiary_address": { "stringValue": "New Delhi" },
    "tender_number": { "stringValue": "NH-45/2025" },
    "validity_months": { "integerValue": "24" },
    "required_by_date": { "stringValue": "2026-04-01" },
    "status": { "stringValue": "PROCESSING" },
    "platform_fee_paid": { "booleanValue": false },
    "offers": { "arrayValue": { "values": [] } },
    "documents": { "arrayValue": { "values": [] } },
    "payments": { "arrayValue": { "values": [] } },
    "audit_trail": { "arrayValue": { "values": [] } }
  }
}

request.description:
Creates a new BG application. Sets status to `PROCESSING` and broadcasts to all banks.

**Role:** Applicant

**Returns:** Firestore document with the new `bg_doc_id` in the `name` field.

Fetch a single BG application by Firestore document ID.

**Role:** Any authenticated user

Returns all BG applications for a specific applicant, ordered by creation date descending.

**Role:** Applicant

Returns all BG applications across all applicants.

**Role:** Admin

Updates the status of a BG application.

**Role:** Admin / System

**Valid statuses:** `DRAFT` → `OPEN` → `QUOTED` → `PROCESSING` → `OFFER_ACCEPTED` → `FD_REQUESTED` → `FD_PAID` → `BG_DRAFTING` → `ISSUED`

Returns all BG applications with `status=PROCESSING`. This is the open market feed visible to all partner banks.

**Role:** Bank

Returns all BGs where this bank's offer was accepted. Used for the bank's issuance desk.

**Role:** Bank

item.name: 🏦 Bank Offers
item.description: Submit, update, and accept bank offers for BG applications. Collection: `bg_offers`

body.raw:
{
  "fields": {
    "offer_id": { "stringValue": "OFR-1234567890" },
    "bg_id": { "stringValue": "BG-1001" },
    "bg_doc_id": { "stringValue": "{{bg_doc_id}}" },
    "bank_id": { "stringValue": "{{bank_id}}" },
    "bank_name": { "stringValue": "HDFC Bank" },
    "applicant_id": { "stringValue": "{{applicant_id}}" },
    "applicant_name": { "stringValue": "Acme Corp Pvt Ltd" },
    "bg_amount": { "integerValue": "5000000" },
    "bg_type": { "stringValue": "Performance BG" },
    "validity_months": { "integerValue": "24" },
    "commission_rate": { "doubleValue": 1.5 },
    "fd_margin": { "doubleValue": 100 },
    "offer_valid_days": { "integerValue": "30" },
    "conditions": { "stringValue": "FD to be opened with HDFC Bank" },
    "valid_till": { "stringValue": "2026-04-12T00:00:00.000Z" },
    "status": { "stringValue": "PENDING" }
  }
}

request.description:
Bank submits a new offer for a BG application. Creates a record in `bg_offers` with `status=PENDING`.

**Role:** Bank

**Returns:** Document with Firestore offer ID

Updates commission rate, FD margin, validity, and conditions on an existing offer.

**Role:** Bank

Returns all offers submitted by a specific bank.

**Role:** Bank

Returns all offers across all BGs for a given applicant.

**Role:** Applicant

Accepts a bank offer. Also update the BG application (use `Update BG Status` to set `OFFER_ACCEPTED`, `accepted_bank_id`, `accepted_bank_name`), and reject all other PENDING offers.

**Role:** Applicant

> ⚠️ In the SDK this is done atomically via `writeBatch`. If calling directly, perform all three updates.

item.name: 💬 Messaging
item.description: Real-time chat between applicant, bank, and admin per BG. Collection: `bg_messages`

request.description:
Sends a message on a BG thread.

**Role:** Bank / Applicant / Admin

**sender_role values:** `bank` | `applicant` | `admin`

Returns all messages for a BG thread in chronological order.

**Role:** Bank / Applicant / Admin

item.name: 📄 Documents
item.description: Document upload records per BG (Draft BG, Final BG, General). Collection: `bg_documents`

request.description:
Adds a document record after uploading the file to Firebase Storage.

**Role:** Bank / Applicant / Admin

**doc_type values:** `DRAFT_BG` | `FINAL_BG` | `GENERAL`

Returns all document records for a BG, ordered by upload date descending.

**Role:** Bank / Applicant / Admin

item.name: 💳 FD & Bank Payment Requests
item.description: FD deposit and bank fee payment requests. Collection: `bg_payment_requests`

request.description:
Bank raises a payment request for FD margin + fees. Also update the BG status to `FD_REQUESTED`.

**Role:** Bank

**Status flow:** `PENDING` → `RECEIPT_UPLOADED` → `APPROVED` / `REJECTED`

Returns all payment requests for a specific BG.

**Role:** Bank / Applicant

Applicant uploads payment receipt. Also update BG status to `FD_PAID`.

**Role:** Applicant

Bank approves the payment receipt. Also update BG status to `BG_DRAFTING`.

**Role:** Bank

> ⚠️ In the SDK this is a batch write — update both `bg_payment_requests` and `bg_applications` together.

Bank rejects the payment receipt. Reverts BG status to `FD_REQUESTED` so applicant can re-upload.

**Role:** Bank

Returns all payment requests for a bank across all BGs.

**Role:** Bank

item.name: 🏛️ Processing Fees (e-BGX)
item.description: Platform processing fee management. Collection: `bg_processing_fees` | Settings: `settings/processing_fee`

request.description:
Reads the current platform processing fee configuration.

**Role:** Any authenticated user

Creates or updates the platform processing fee configuration.

**Role:** Admin

Reads the processing fee payment record for a specific BG. Document ID = bg_doc_id.

**Role:** Applicant / Admin

Applicant uploads the processing fee payment receipt.

**Role:** Applicant

Admin approves the processing fee payment. Also set `platform_fee_paid=true` on the BG application.

**Role:** Admin

Returns all processing fees with status `PENDING` or `RECEIPT_UPLOADED`.

**Role:** Admin

item.name: 📝 Draft BG + Final BG
item.description: Bank uploads draft BG for applicant review, applicant approves/rejects, bank issues final BG.

request.description:
Step 1: Bank uploads the draft BG PDF. Also update BG: `status=BG_DRAFTING`, `draft_bg_approved=false`.

**Role:** Bank

Applicant approves the draft BG. Sets `draft_bg_approved=true`.

**Role:** Applicant

> ⚠️ Firestore rule requires BG to be in `BG_DRAFTING` status for applicant to update.

Applicant rejects the draft BG. Bank must upload a revised draft.

**Role:** Applicant

Step 1: Upload final BG document. Then update BG: `status=ISSUED`, `official_bg_number`, `issued_at`.

**Role:** Bank

item.name: 👤 User Management
item.description: Applicant and bank user management. Collection: `users`

request.description:
Returns all applicant users.

**Role:** Admin

Returns applicants pending KYC review.

**Role:** Admin

Updates KYC status of an applicant.

**Role:** Admin

**Values:** `APPROVED` | `REJECTED`

Returns all bank users.

**Role:** Admin

Updates bank account status.

**Role:** Admin

**Values:** `ACTIVE` | `REJECTED` | `SUSPENDED`

item.name: ⚙️ Admin Controls
item.description: Admin-only BG management actions and platform configuration.

request.description:
Admin cancels a BG request, reverting status to `DRAFT`.

**Role:** Admin

Admin waives the platform processing fee for a BG.

**Role:** Admin

Admin re-broadcasts a BG to all banks by resetting it to `PROCESSING` and clearing the accepted bank.

**Role:** Admin

Reads global platform configuration.

**Role:** Admin

Creates or overwrites the global platform configuration.

**Role:** Admin

item.name: 🔄 Amendment Requests
item.description: Amendment and renewal requests on issued BGs. Collection: `bg_amendments`

request.description:
Creates an amendment/renewal request on an issued BG.

**Role:** Applicant

Returns all amendment requests for a specific BG.

**Role:** Admin / Bank
